query:
SELECT CONCAT(c.id, '|', c.sessionId, '|', IFNULL(c.customerName,'null'), '|user:', 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.conversationId = c.id AND m.role = 'user'), 
  '|asst:', 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.conversationId = c.id AND m.role = 'assistant'),
  '|total:',
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.conversationId = c.id)) as info
FROM conversations c WHERE c.channel = 'line' ORDER BY c.id;
